seo.title: North Hills Psychiatry | Compassionate Psychiatric Care in Austin
seo.description: Patient-centered psychiatric care for adults and families in North Hills, Austin, Texas.

practice.name: North Hills Psychiatry

hero.title: Care that starts with understanding.
hero.copy: Psychiatric care for adults and families navigating anxiety, ADHD, depression, and life transitions with thoughtful, individualized treatment.

home.providerCopy: Warm, evidence-based psychiatric care with a calm first step into treatment.

providers.name: Dr. Zita Samuel
providers.specialty: Adult psychiatric care for anxiety, depression, ADHD, and mood concerns
providers.tagline: Combining deep clinical expertise with a supportive, holistic approach, Dr. Samuel helps individuals navigate complex mental health challenges, life transitions, and emotional stressors. Welcoming new patients at our Austin clinic.
bioParagraphs: Dr. Zita Samuel is a board-certified adult psychiatrist specializing in evidence-based care for anxiety, depression, ADHD, and mood disorders. Combining her extensive clinical and academic background, she partners closely with patients to understand their unique symptoms, history, and goals to build practical, effective treatment paths.

Before joining North Hills Psychiatry, Dr. Samuel served as an Assistant Professor at the University of Texas Medical Branch, where she led emergency psychiatry and consultation-liaison psychiatric services.

education.medicalSchool: American University Of The Caribbean School Of Medicine
residency: Loyola University Medical Center, Maywood, IL

whatToExpect: Thoughtful conversations tailored to your symptoms, history, and goals
Clear guidance around diagnosis, medication, and treatment options
Practical strategies for navigating daily routines and life transitions
providers.ctaTitle: Take the next step toward feeling more like yourself
providers.ctaCopy: Contact our Austin office to request an initial adult psychiatry assessment, verify your insurance benefits, and discuss availability.
providers.cardDescription: Combining deep clinical expertise with a supportive, holistic approach, Dr. Samuel helps individuals navigate complex mental health challenges, life transitions, and emotional stressors. Welcoming new patients at our Austin clinic.

providers.name: Dr. Diana Samuel
providers.heroTitle: Psychiatric Care for Children, Teens, Adults, and Families.
providers.tagline: Compassionate psychiatric care for children, teens, and families managing anxiety, mood concerns, ADHD, and life stressors.
bioParagraphs: Dr. Diana Tressa Samuel provides thoughtful, evidence-based psychiatric care tailored specifically for children, adolescents, and young adults. Partnering closely with families, she specializes in managing complex developmental, emotional, and behavioral needs to support long-term growth and well-being.

residency: Icahn School of Medicine at Mount Sinai Hospital, New York, NY
fellowship: University of Texas Southwestern, Dallas, Texas

providers.aboutHeading: Thoughtful Psychiatric Care for Children, Teens, Adults, and Families

conditionsIntro: We provide evaluation and ongoing treatment for a range of psychiatric and emotional health concerns.

plans.name: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Texas

faqs.question: Do you offer telehealth appointments?
faqs.answer: Yes. Many appointments are available virtually, depending on provider availability and patient needs.

faqs.question: Do you accept insurance?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our office can help confirm accepted plans, benefits, and any next steps before your first visit.

faqs.question: How do I request an appointment?
faqs.answer: Submit the appointment request form or call the office. Our team will follow up with availability and next steps.

contact.title: Ready to get started?
contact.copy: Request an appointment and our office will follow up with next steps, availability, and insurance information.
contact.disclaimer: We typically respond within 1 business day.
